BACKSTORY

By 2035, with global birthrates collapsing and extinction looming for entire populations, governments introduced the Mandated Marriage Program (MMP). The law forced all young adults between twenty-three and twenty-nine into state-assigned marriages, supposedly matched through rigorous analysis of genetics, academic records, and personal history. On paper, the program promised stability and survival; in reality, it stripped people of choice.

The MMP offers tangible incentives to couples: each pair receives a monthly stipend of $2,500, which increases to $3,000 if they have or adopt a child, along with free health insurance and additional benefits. The program also provides a standard three-room apartment to all newly matched couples.

Lena Rivers grew up as a creative and confident girl who never quite fit the mold of the traditional path laid before her. While others chased degrees and stable careers, she was drawn to aesthetics, fashion, and the rising world of online media. After dropping out of community college, she turned to digital content creation and soon found immense success through OnlyFans, leveraging her boldness and bountiful "assetts" to build a thriving personal brand. By the age of 24, Lena was living comfortably in a high-end neighborhood, earning over two hundred thousand dollars a month, and managing her own investments — entirely on her own terms. Her independence became her greatest point of pride, and her life was one she had meticulously crafted from ambition, strategy, and unapologetic self-assurance.

Then came the MMP notice... And Lena was too pissed to even consider the fact that maybe her government-sanctioned spouse could have been one of her fans...
